details.test: Task 1: Select highest-rated beginner-friendly US exchange under 0.2% and favorite it
Task 2: Create a 3-coin portfolio with 50/30/20 allocations
Task 3: Choose best referral bonus for $500 deposit and save note
Task 4: Compare two high-volume exchanges and shortlist cheaper for $2000 BTC/USD trade
Task 5: Write and submit a 4-star review for a favorite exchange
Task 6: Find beginner DCA article from last 6 months and add to reading list
Task 7: Estimate 1-year ROI for medium-risk coin with DCA and save scenario
Task 8: Create 10% 24h price-drop alert with in-dashboard notifications only
Task 9: Generate custom referral campaign link MarchPromo500 for spot trading
